title: OREGON PRESCRIPTION DRUG PROGRAM ARRAYRX - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON PRESCRIPTION DRUG PROGRAM ARRAYRX Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps Oregonians purchase prescription drugs at up to an 80% discount on generic drugs, and up to 20% off brand-name drugs. Website maintains list of participating pharmacies and current drug prices. 800 NE Oregon Street Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email - (800) 913-4284 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Toll-free (800) 913-4284 Enrollment Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to apply FEES: None to apply for the program. Cost of discounted prescription drugs varies. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Prescription Drug Discount Cards Prescription Expense Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ALERT IMMUNIZATION INFORMATION SYSTEM COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - OREGON SCREENWISE PROGRAM CONSUMER REGULATION - BIRTH CERTIFICATES CONSUMER REGULATION - OREGON VITAL RECORDS CONSUMER REGULATION - SENIOR FARM DIRECT APPLICATION FOR FARMERS & FARM STANDS DISASTER SERVICES - STATE EMERGENCY REGISTRY OF VOLUNTEERS IN OREGON DISASTER SERVICES - WINTER WEATHER ADVISORIES ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AND IMPROVEMENT - CLIMATE CHANGE AND HEALTH FOOD - SENIOR FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM FOOD - WIC FARM DIRECT NUTRITION PROGRAM HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - BREAST AND CERVICAL CANCER TREATMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON IMMUNIZATION PROGRAM HUMAN REPRODUCTION - A SAFE PLACE FOR NEWBORNS HUMAN REPRODUCTION - REPRODUCTIVE AND SEXUAL HEALTH HUMAN REPRODUCTION - STATE OF OREGON CONDOM DELIVERY PROGRAM INFORMATION SERVICES - DEATH WITH DIGNITY ACT MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - PSILOCYBIN SERVICES PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OREGON WIC ADMINISTRATION PUBLIC HEALTH - COMMUNICABLE DISEASE INFORMATION PUBLIC HEALTH - ENVIRONMENTAL PUBLIC HEALTH PUBLIC HEALTH - LOCAL PUBLIC HEALTH AUTHORITY DIRECTORY PUBLIC SAFETY - OHA DRINKING WATER DATA ONLINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - EARLY HEARING DETECTION AND INTERVENTION SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - OREGON MEDICAL MARIJUANA PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES FOR CHILDREN SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OREGON HOPELINE SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - TOBACCO QUIT LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION
